name: Fruit and Cabbage Salad (Kal-och Appelsallad)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Green cabbage; shredded (about 1/4 med head)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place oranges, apples, cabbage, and grapes in a bowl.
2. Beat whipping cream in a chilled bowl until stiff.
3. Fold whipped cream into the mayonnaise along with sugar, lemon juice, and salt.
4. Stir the mixture into the fruit.
